modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble installing USB scanner on computer.

full_description_text: The user is trying to set up a USB scanner but is having issues. They plugged it in, but it doesn't seem to work. The computer isn't recognizing the scanner at all, and they are unsure what to do next.
short_description: Trouble installing USB scanner on computer.
description: The user is trying to set up a USB scanner but is having issues. They plugged it in, but it doesn't seem to work. The computer isn't recognizing the scanner at all, and they are unsure what to do next.
